---
title: "Field Descriptions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Field Descriptions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  comment = "#>"
)

read_combined_dictionary <- function() {
  candidate_paths <- c(
    file.path("inst", "extdata", "combined_data_dictionary.csv"),
    file.path("..", "inst", "extdata", "combined_data_dictionary.csv")
  )

  dictionary_path <- candidate_paths[file.exists(candidate_paths)][1]
  if (is.na(dictionary_path)) {
    stop("Missing shared dictionary file at inst/extdata/combined_data_dictionary.csv. Run data-raw/build_combined_data_dictionary.R to refresh it.")
  }

  utils::read.csv(dictionary_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

shared_dictionary <- read_combined_dictionary()
field_dictionary <- subset(shared_dictionary, source == "nflfastR::field_descriptions")
use_dt <- requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r eval = use_dt}
DT::datatable(
  field_dictionary,
  options = list(scrollX = TRUE, pageLength = 25),
  filter = "top",
  rownames = FALSE,
  style = "bootstrap4"
)
```

```{r eval = !use_dt}
knitr::kable(field_dictionary)
```
